title: Destry Rides Again
writer: Max Brand, Robert Keith, Richard Schayer
actors: Tom Mix, Claudia Dell, Zasu Pitts
plot: Brant frames Destry and has men testify against him. Found guilty he vows to return. Back from prison he goes after the man that framed him. When the Sheriff is shot before he can talk, Destry chases down the killer and learning B...
